questionEN: A developer needs to run code only when a condition is true. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да изпълни код само когато условие е true. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: if statement проверява Boolean условие преди изпълнение.
explanationEN: if statement is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to choose between many known cases. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да избере между много известни cases. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: switch statement прави multi-case branching четимо.
explanationEN: switch statement is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to repeat work for each item. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да повтори работа за всеки item. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: for loop обхожда collection или range.
explanationEN: for loop is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to repeat while a condition remains true. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да повтаря докато условие остава true. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: while loop продължава, докато условието е true.
explanationEN: while loop is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to require two conditions to pass. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да изисква две условия да минат. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: && е logical AND и изисква двете страни да са true.
explanationEN: && is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to allow either condition to pass. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да позволи което и да е от две условия да мине. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: || е logical OR и изисква поне една true страна.
explanationEN: || is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to invert a Boolean condition. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да обърне Boolean условие. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: ! превръща true във false и обратно.
explanationEN: ! is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to check equality. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да провери равенство. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: == сравнява дали две стойности са равни.
explanationEN: == is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to check inequality. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да провери неравенство. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: != проверява дали две стойности са различни.
explanationEN: != is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to find a remainder after division. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да намери остатък след деление. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Modulo връща остатъка от целочислено деление.
explanationEN: modulo is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to handle the first item processed first. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да обработи първия item първи. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Queue следва FIFO: first in, first out.
explanationEN: queue is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to handle the last item processed first. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да обработи последния item първи. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Stack следва LIFO: last in, first out.
explanationEN: stack is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to stop recursion safely. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да спре recursion безопасно. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Base case предотвратява безкрайна recursion.
explanationEN: base case is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to describe unusual input. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да опише необичаен input. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Edge case е рядка или крайна ситуация, която може да счупи logic.
explanationEN: edge case is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to estimate algorithm growth. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да оцени растежа на algorithm. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Big O описва как cost расте спрямо input size.
explanationEN: Big O is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to represent constant-time work. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да представи constant-time work. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: O(1) означава, че cost не расте с input size.
explanationEN: O(1) is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to represent linear work. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да представи linear work. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: O(n) расте приблизително пропорционално на input size.
explanationEN: O(n) is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to track allowed transitions. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да следи позволени transitions. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: State machine моделира states и валидни transitions.
explanationEN: state machine is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to store lookup by key. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да пази lookup по key. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Hash map осигурява бързо average lookup по key.
explanationEN: hash map is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to search sorted data efficiently. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да търси sorted data ефективно. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Binary search дели sorted search space наполовина.
explanationEN: binary search is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to break a problem into parts. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да разбие проблем на части. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Decomposition прави сложните problems по-малки и управляеми.
explanationEN: decomposition is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Programming Logic workflow.
